top_signals.title: Marvell Surges After Huang Calls It the Next $1 Trillion Company
top_signals.summary: Marvell Technology Inc. shares surged 26% in premarket trading on Tuesday after Nvidia Corp.’s Jensen Huang predicted that the semiconductor and networking company will be the next business to hit a $1 trillion valuation, more than five times its current capitalization.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
top_signals.summary: Until this past weekend, a contractor for the Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) maintained a public GitHub repository that exposed credentials to several highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and a large number of internal CISA systems. Security experts said the public archive included files detailing how CISA builds, tests and deploys software internally, and that it represents one of the most egregious government data leaks in recent history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Strategy sold bitcoin in late May, and told the market in June. Here's how Polymarket bettors are fighting over when it counts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Palo Alto, CrowdStrike Earnings to Put 37% Cyber Rally to Test
top_signals.summary: Investors are about to get a read on the durability of the soaring rally in cybersecurity stocks when two of the industry’s major players report earnings in the coming days.

top_signals.title: Google taps markets for $30bn AI cash call
top_signals.summary: Alphabet will raise up to $80bn (£59bn) from investors to fund its AI expansion, marking one of the largest equity fundraisings in history and a major shift for a company that has traditionally relied on its vast cash generation to finance growth. The Google parent said on Monday it would use the proceeds to expand [...]
